title: oncostema elongata
intro: Oncostema elongata, also known as the dragon's breath or fire cracker bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oncostema elongata include its ability to relieve pain and reduce fever, as well as its potential to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Oncostema elongata can be made by extracting its roots and leaves, and are often used in teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
